page_not_found: The page you are looking for does not exist. It might have been moved or deleted.
problem_sections_description: Polling sections in Roma neighborhoods widely reported as vote-buying and controlled-vote risk areas. Sources: Anti-Corruption Fund, Sega, Svobodna Evropa.
problem_sections_not_available: No problem sections data available for this election.
valid_votes_explainer: Total number of the actual votes submitted for the lists of candidates of parties, coalitions and initiative committees
valid_paper_votes_explainer: Total number of the actual votes submitted using paper ballots for the lists of candidates of parties, coalitions and initiative committees
total_voters_explainer: The total number of voters according to the signatures in the voting list, including the additional voters (under the line) and the damaged paper ballots
total_machine_votes_explainer: The total number of actual votes from the machines, supporting the lists of candidates of parties, coalitions and initiative committees
num_registered_voters_explainer: The number of voters in the election lists delivered to the election commission
num_additional_voters_explainer: The number of voters, listed in the additional page (under the line) of the election lists on the day of the elections
num_all_voters_explainer: The total number of voters in the election lists and the voters in the additional page (under the line)
pct_valid_votes_explainer: Percent of the valid votes submitted, compared to the total number of voters
pct_additional_voters_explainer: Percentage of the additional voters, compared to the total number of actual voters
pct_total_voters_explainer: Percentage of the actual voters, compared to the total number of registered voters in the election lists
pct_invalid_ballots_to_all_votes_explain: Percentage of the invalid paper ballots, compared to the total number of actual voters
num_invalid_ballots_explainer: The number of invalid (damaged) paper ballots cast in the voting boxes
num_supports_no_one_explainer: The number of voters using paper ballots, who selected the option "I support no one"
pct_supports_no_one_explainer: Percentage of the voters using paper ballots, who have selected the option "I support no one", compared to the total number of voters using paper ballots
pct_paper_votes_explainer: Percentage of the voters using paper ballots for voting, compared to the total number of valid votes
num_paper_ballots_found_explainer: The number of paper ballots found in the voting boxes
pct_valid_paper_ballots: Percentage of the valid paper ballots, compared to the total number of paper ballots found
num_invalid_paper_ballots: The number of invalid (filled incorrectly) paper ballots found
pct_invalid_paper_ballots: Percentage of the invalid (filled incorrectly) paper ballots, compared to the total number of paper ballots found
pct_supports_noone_paper_ballots: Percentage of the paper ballots with the selected option "I support no one", compared to the total number of paper ballots found
pct_machine_votes_explainer: Percentage of the voters using machine voting, compared to the total number of valid votes
num_machine_ballots_found_explainer: The number of machine ballots found in the election boxes
num_machine_supports_no_one_explainer: The number of voters using machine voting, that selected the option "I support no one"
pct_supports_noone_machine_ballots: Percentage of the voters using machine voting, who have selected the option "I support no one", compared to the total number of voters using machine voting
one_party_votes_over: with the votes for one party over
total_party_votes_explainer: The number of votes for the specific party
pct_party_votes_explainer: The percentage of the votes for the specific party, compared to the votes for all parties
support_no_one_over: with voters supporting no one over
party_num_explainer: The ballot number of the party in the selected elections
prev_election_votes_explainer: The number of votes for the party in the previous elections
prev_election_change_votes_explainer: How many votes are lost by the party since the previous election
pct_prev_election_votes_explainer: The percentage change of the votes for the party in the selected elections, compared to the votes in the previous elections
all_parties_description: Full list of parties with their votes, share, and change vs the prior election.
all_preferences_description: Preference votes for every candidate across all regions, parties, and ballot positions.
all_flash_memory_description: Per-party comparison of recounted machine votes against the values reported by the flash memory of voting machines.
all_recount_description: Per-party summary of vote changes (added and removed) recorded during the official recount of paper and machine ballots.
dashboard_recount_hint: Per-party net change in paper and machine votes resulting from the official recount. Negative values mean votes were removed; positive values mean votes were added.
all_regions_description: Full table of votes by region, including paper and machine votes and the winning party in each region.
all_municipalities_description: Full table of votes by municipality within the region, including paper and machine votes and the winning party in each municipality.
all_settlements_description: Full table of votes by settlement within the municipality, including paper and machine votes and the winning party in each settlement.
all_sections_description: Full table of polling stations in this settlement, with turnout, paper and machine vote totals, and the winning party in each section.
all_elections_explainer: All elections votes in the system for the party/coalition
about_p_1: Over the past four years, Bulgaria has faced an unprecedented political challenge, holding a record-breaking seven elections without achieving a stable, functioning government.
about_p_2: Voter fatigue and disillusionment with politicians have created an environment where radical political voices, aided by Moscow's widespread disinformation, are successfully undermining public support for the democratic process and boosting the popularity of pro-Russian and far-right groups.
about_p_3: The never-ending election spiral has a serious impact on Bulgaria's economy and its foreign policy. The country risks losing billions of euros in EU recovery funds because of the lack of reforms. Full integration into the open-border Schengen area and joining the eurozone are likely to be delayed further.
about_p_4: During this period, Bulgaria has become a breeding ground for conspiracy theories and growing distrust in the electoral system. This platform seeks to counteract misinformation by providing transparent access to real election data and offering an intuitive way to analyze the results.
project_about: This project began as a collaborative effort between a father and son, designed to be open-source and welcoming to contributors from all backgrounds. With a focus on versatility and ease of use, it provides access to comprehensive election results from the past 10 years, empowering everyone to explore and engage with the data.
martin_about: Graduated from Cornell and worked at Bandwidth and SentinelOne
martin_experience: Frontend, design, testing and user experience
atanas_about: A lifetime of creating software, founder of
atanas_experience: Designed and created software platforms in the accounting, financial, software quality assurance industries.
about_data: Under the hood, this platform uses a variety of data and geoJSON maps from multiple open or government sources.
consolidated_data_explainer: The data from previous elections will be adjusted to account for significant splits, mergers, or reconfigurations of political parties and coalitions.
show_total_votes_explainer: Show the total votes for all parties
top_gainers_over: with a party gaining from the previous election over
include_abroad_explainer: When this option is checked, the reports will include voters from abroad
mp_profiles_source: Photos and biographies of National Assembly members
pct_adjusted_change_explainer: Change for the party votes, adjusted for the increase/decrease in voters participation in the previous elections
polls_description: How accurate have the major Bulgarian polling agencies been? Comparing their final pre-election polls against the actual results from the Central Election Commission, with party-level bias and ideological-bloc lean.
polls_leaderboard_hint: Mean absolute error in percentage points across each agency's final pre-election polls. Lower is better.
polls_election_accuracy_hint: Each agency's last poll before the election, compared to the actual result.
polls_data_source: Source: BG Wikipedia polling tables · Actual results: Central Election Commission · Analysis generated with Gemini
polls_no_data_for_election: No agency polling data on file for the {{date}} election. The cross-election analysis below still applies.
polls_no_polls_for_agency: No polls on file for this agency yet.
polls_no_detail_breakdown: No party breakdown on file for this poll.
polls_actual_marker_legend: The dark vertical line on each bar marks the actual election result.
polls_section_all_time_hint: Aggregated across every election cycle in our dataset, not just the one selected above.
dashboard_polls_hint: Each agency's final pre-election poll vs. the actual result for this election. MAE = mean absolute error in percentage points across parties.
dashboard_accuracy_trends_hint: Cross-agency average mean absolute error (MAE) per election. Bars above the dashed line are elections where polls were collectively further off than usual — often a signal that something unexpected happened (a late shift, a new party, or a sampling miss).
polls_anomalous_hint: When every agency misses by more than 3pp, it usually points to a late shift in voter sentiment or a party that was hard to sample.
total_financing_explainer: The total campaign financing from parties, donors, candidates and media packages
total_financing_prev_campaign_explainer: The total financing in the previous campaign from parties, donors, candidates and media packages
total_financing_ptc_change_explainer: Percentage change in the campaign financing from the previous campaign
prior_campaign_financing_explainer: Income in the previous election campaign
source_of_income_explainer: Breakdown of the sources for financing the election campaign
name: Name
raised_funds_explainer: The total amount of funds raised for financing the electoral campaign
raised_funds_pct_change_explainer: The change of the raised funds since the previous campaign
campaign_cost_explainer: The total amount of expenses incurred during the electoral campaign, including the non-monetary contributions
campaign_cost_pct_change_explainer: The percent change in campaign cost since the previous campaign
no_financing_data: We could not find campaign financing data for
no_party_information: We could not find this party in the elections on
paper_votes_explainer: Total paper votes for the party
paper_votes_change_explainer: Percentage change in the paper votes for the party since the previous elections
machine_votes_explainer: Total machine votes for the party
machine_votes_change_explainer: Percentage change in the machine votes for the party since the previous elections
position_change_explainer: Change in the party position since the previous elections
pct_pref_explainer: Percent of the preferences for the candidate, compared to all the preferences for the party in this area
pct_pref_votes_explainer: Percent of the preferences for the candidate, compared to all the votes for the party in this area
pct_pref_all_votes_explainer: Percent of the preferences for the candidate, compared to the votes for all parties in this area
total_preferences_explainer: Total preferences cast for the candidate
pct_recount_changes_explainer: Percent change in the votes for the party during the recount
num_machine_recount_explainer: Change of machine votes after the recount
pct_machine_recount_explainer: Percent change of machine vote in the recount from the original count
num_paper_recount_explainer: Change in paper ballot votes after the recount
num_votes_recount_explainer: Change of all votes after the recount
pct_added_recount_explainer: Percent of the added votes in the recount to all votes
pct_removed_recount_explainer: Percent of the removed votes in the recount to all votes
num_added_recount_votes: The number of added votes during the recount
num_removed_recount_votes: The number of removed votes during the recount
no_machine_votes: There is data for machine voting
party_preferences_pct_change_explainer: Change in party preferences since the previous election
party_paper_preferences_pct_change_expla: Change in party preferences with paper ballots since the previous election
party_machine_preferences_pct_change_exp: Change in party preferences with machine ballots since the previous election
coalition_simulator_description: Explore parliamentary seat allocation and coalition arithmetic for Bulgarian elections.
actual_seats_explainer: Official seat allocation as certified by the Central Election Commission. Dashed line marks the 121-seat majority.
whatif_explainer: Counterfactual: see how seats would shift if the threshold changed. Allocation uses the largest-remainder (Hare quota) method on a single national constituency, so it approximates rather than reproduces the per-district CEC allocation.
no_majority_possible: No coalition of up to four parties reaches a majority.
dashboard_top_gainer_hint: Party with the largest gain in vote share compared to the prior election. New parties baseline against 0%.
dashboard_top_loser_hint: Party with the largest drop in vote share compared to the prior election.
dashboard_no_prior_data: No prior-election data to compare against.
dashboard_turnout_hint: Share of registered voters who actually voted; delta is versus the previous parliamentary election.
dashboard_anomalies_hint: Unique sections flagged by at least one anomaly report: recount, zero valid votes after recount, machine flash-memory discrepancies, missing flash memory, and curated problem sections.
dashboard_paper_machine_hint: Share of valid votes cast on paper ballots vs voting machines. Delta compares paper share against the previous parliamentary election.
dashboard_problem_sections_hint: Polling sections inside Bulgarian Roma neighborhoods widely reported as vote-buying risk areas. Counts and turnout aggregated across all sections in each neighborhood.
dashboard_problem_votes_by_party_hint: Votes captured in problem sections (high vote-buying risk neighborhoods) by parties that crossed the 4% national threshold. Δpp compares the party's share of problem votes against the previous parliamentary election.
dashboard_coalition_hint: Minimal majority coalitions (up to 4 parties) reaching the 121-seat majority based on official results.
dashboard_no_seats_yet: Official seat allocation is not yet available for this election.
dashboard_regional_map_hint: Bulgaria's 28 regions coloured by the leading party. Click a region to drill into its municipalities; switch labels with the layers toggle.
dashboard_top_candidates_hint: Each leading party's most-voted preference candidate nationwide and the region where their best result came from. Click to open the candidate's profile.
dashboard_flash_memory_diff_hint: Per-party comparison of votes recorded on the voting-machine flash memory (suemgVotes) against the votes typed into the section protocols (machineVotes). A non-zero drift means the two sources disagree for that party — positive means the protocol recorded more votes than the flash memory.
dashboard_historical_trends_hint: Bubble chart of every party in every parliamentary election since 2005. Bubble area is proportional to total votes; vertical position is share of valid votes. Lines thread parties together across rebrands.
party_trajectory_hint: This party's national vote share across every parliamentary election it contested. The dashed line marks the 4% threshold; a hollow ringed dot signals a rebrand or coalition change at that election. The current election is highlighted.
party_polling_delta_hint: How far this party's actual result differed from the cross-agency average of pre-election polls. Positive bars mean the party outperformed its polling; negative bars mean it underperformed. Only elections with available polling data are shown.
dashboard_top_financing_hint: Total declared campaign income per party — sum of contributions from the party itself, donors, candidates, and the state media package. Click a row to open the party's profile, or 'See details' for the full breakdown.
dashboard_top_parties_hint: Vote totals for parties that crossed the 4% parliamentary threshold in this election. Click a row to open the party's profile.
dashboard_top_regions_hint: The regions contributing the most votes in this election, ranked by total votes cast. Click a row to explore the region's results.
dashboard_top_municipalities_hint: The municipalities within this region contributing the most votes, ranked by total votes cast. Click a row to explore the municipality's settlements.
dashboard_regional_map_municipalities_hi: Map of the municipalities in this region. Click a marker to drill into a municipality.
dashboard_top_settlements_hint: The settlements within this municipality contributing the most votes, ranked by total votes cast. Click a row to explore the settlement's polling sections.
dashboard_top_diaspora_hint: Countries with the most polling sections opened for Bulgarian citizens abroad. Click a country to see its sections, addresses and turnout for the latest election.
dashboard_top_cities_hint: Bulgarian cities with the most polling sections, ranked by section count. Click a city to see its sections and addresses for the latest election.
dashboard_municipality_map_settlements_h: Map of the settlements in this municipality. Click a marker to drill into a settlement's polling sections.
dashboard_settlement_map_sections_hint: Map of the polling sections in this settlement. Click a marker to view the section's results.
dashboard_settlement_top_sections_hint: The polling sections in this settlement with the most actual voters, ranked by turnout count. Click a row to view the section's results.
dashboard_settlement_sections_hint: All polling sections in this settlement, ranked by actual voters. Click a row to view the section's results.
dashboard_sofia_map_hint: Sofia City's three multi-mandate constituencies (23, 24, 25). Click a marker to drill into an area's results.
dashboard_top_sofia_areas_hint: Vote totals across the three Sofia City constituencies (MIR 23, 24, 25). Click a row to drill into an area.
dashboard_sofia_mps_hint: All MPs elected from Sofia City's three constituencies (MIR 23, 24, 25), grouped by party. Hover for the MP's photo and party group.
dashboard_mandates_hint: Hemicycle of all 240 seats coloured by the holding party. Seats are ordered left-to-right starting from the largest party. Open the simulator to explore threshold what-ifs.
dashboard_suspicious_hint: Settlements that exceeded one of three integrity thresholds when their polling sections are aggregated: extreme single-party concentration, high invalid-ballot rate, or unusual share of voters added on the day. Settlements abroad are excluded.
dashboard_suspicious_concentrated_hint: Settlements where a single party received {{threshold}}% or more of valid votes — well above any normal aggregate result.
dashboard_suspicious_invalid_hint: Settlements where invalid ballots are at least {{threshold}}% of paper ballots cast — roughly double the typical national rate.
dashboard_suspicious_additional_hint: Settlements where voters added under the line are at least {{threshold}}% of actual voters. Tiny settlements (fewer than {{floor}} voters) are excluded to avoid rounding noise.
compare_description: Side-by-side comparison of two parliamentary elections: turnout, party shares, seats, and section anomaly counts.
compare_same_election_warning: You picked the same election on both sides — pick different ones to see the deltas.
compare_no_data: No data available for the selected elections.
compare_same_region_warning: You picked the same region on both sides — pick different ones.
compare_same_party_warning: You picked the same party on both sides — pick different ones.
compare_pick_two_candidates: Pick a candidate on each side to compare.
compare_same_candidate_warning: You picked the same candidate on both sides — pick different ones.
articles_meta_description: Long-form data analysis of Bulgarian parliamentary elections — turnout, machine flash discrepancies, risk neighborhoods, polling accuracy.
dashboard_articles_hint: In-depth comparative analysis of election integrity metrics across all elections in the dataset.
timeline_description: Bubble timeline of political parties across all 13 parliamentary elections since 2005.
timeline_explainer: Each bubble is one party in one election. The horizontal axis is the election date, the vertical axis is share of valid votes. Bubble area is proportional to total votes.
timeline_legend_hint: Click a bubble for the party's detail page. Parties under 0.5% are hidden to keep the chart legible.
candidate_namesake_intro: Multiple candidates share this name. Pick the one you meant:
source_declarations: Source: property and interest declarations filed with the Bulgarian Court of Audit (Сметна палата). Sitting MPs cannot legally hold management roles, so this list covers ownership stakes only.
dashboard_region_mps_hint: MPs elected from this region for the corresponding National Assembly. The party shown is the one each candidate ran with. Photos and biographies are from parliament.bg. Hover a dot or avatar for details.
dashboard_party_voters_hint: Total votes cast for this party in this election, with delta vs the prior election. The percentage is the party's share of all valid votes nationally.
dashboard_party_position_hint: The party's overall ranking by total votes in this election, with arrow showing change vs the prior election.
dashboard_party_paper_machine_hint: How this party's voters split between paper ballots and voting machines, with the change vs prior election. Useful for spotting demographic shifts in the party's base.
dashboard_party_top_region_hint: The region contributing the most votes to this party. Position is the party's rank within that region's vote.
dashboard_party_top_regions_hint: All electoral regions ranked by votes for this party. Bar = absolute votes; % = party's share of the region's vote; change = percentage-point swing vs prior election. Click a region to drill into its full results.
dashboard_party_top_municipalities_hint: Municipalities where this party drew the most votes. % local = party's share of that municipality's vote; change = absolute vote difference vs prior election.
dashboard_party_top_settlements_hint: Towns and villages where this party drew the most votes. % local = party's share of that settlement's vote; change = absolute vote difference vs prior election.
dashboard_party_swings_hint: Regions where the party gained or lost the most percentage points vs the prior election. Useful for identifying where to defend, attack, or investigate.
dashboard_party_assessment_hint: AI-written analysis of this party's performance — what worked, what didn't, and where to focus next campaign. Generated offline from the party's vote, polling, and (where available) financing data.
dashboard_assessment_not_generated: Retrospect not yet generated for this party. Run the party-retrospect skill to produce one.
dashboard_party_top_candidates_hint: The party's strongest preferential-vote candidates — those whose personal vote count was highest within the party. Click a candidate for the full profile across regions.
dashboard_party_raised_funds_hint: Total funds raised by this party for the campaign — sum of contributions from the party itself, donors, candidates, and the state media package. Delta compares to the same party's total in the prior election.
dashboard_party_campaign_cost_hint: Total declared campaign expenses including non-monetary contributions. A higher cost than the prior cycle is shown in red, lower in green. The secondary line shows how much of the cost came from non-monetary contributions.
dashboard_party_top_expense_hint: The single largest expense bucket on this party's filing — useful as a quick read of where the campaign budget went.
dashboard_party_donors_count_hint: Number of declared individual donors and the total amount they contributed. The candidates line shows the same for candidate self-funding. Click the count to see the full donor list.
dashboard_party_expense_breakdown_hint: All campaign expense categories ranked by amount. Bar = absolute spend; share = percent of total cost; change = percent change vs the prior election (red = increase, green = decrease).
dashboard_party_top_donors_hint: The 10 largest individual donors to this party's campaign. Bar = donor's amount relative to the largest donor; share = percent of all donor contributions.
dashboard_candidate_preferences_hint: Total preferential votes the candidate received across all regions, with the percent change vs the prior election. The secondary share is the candidate's slice of the party's total preferences this election.
dashboard_candidate_paper_machine_hint: How the candidate's preferential votes split between paper ballots and voting machines, with the change vs prior election.
dashboard_candidate_ballot_hint: List position(s) the candidate occupied on the party ballot. Some candidates ran in more than one region; each region has its own list number.
dashboard_candidate_top_region_hint: The region where the candidate drew the most preferential votes. Share is relative to all preferential votes for the party in that region.
dashboard_candidate_regions_hint: Per-region breakdown of preferential votes for this candidate. Bar = absolute votes; % region = candidate's share of all valid votes in that region; change = absolute vote difference vs prior election.
dashboard_candidate_top_settlements_hint: Towns and villages where the candidate drew the most preferential votes. % of party = candidate's share of the party's preferences in that settlement; % local = candidate's share of all valid votes in that settlement.
dashboard_candidate_top_sections_hint: Polling stations where the candidate drew the most preferential votes. % of party = candidate's share of the party's preferences in that station; % local = candidate's share of all valid votes in that station.
dashboard_candidate_trajectory_hint: Preferential votes for this candidate across consecutive elections, broken down by region. Useful for spotting whether the candidate's personal vote is growing or fading.
dashboard_candidate_donations_hint: Self-funded contributions declared by this candidate to their party's campaign. Total combines monetary and non-monetary contributions.
all_companies_description: Every company any seated or former MP has declared a stake in, with current TR status when matched.
all_companies_search_placeholder: Search by name, MP, UIC, or city…
dashboard_mp_connections_top_mps_subtitl: shared companies with N other MPs
dashboard_mp_connections_provenance_none: No declarations on file for this parliament yet
dashboard_mp_connections_no_cars: No vehicle declarations on file for this parliament yet
mp_cars_page_description: Every passenger car or jeep declared by an MP (or their spouse) in the most recent declaration on file, sorted by declared BGN value.
mp_cars_page_summary: {{total}} cars · {{valued}} with declared value · combined {{sum}} BGN
mp_cars_page_footer: Cars (passenger vehicles + jeeps) extracted from the most-recent declaration of every MP. Spouse-held cars are listed with holder = spouse. Source: register.cacbg.bg (Bulgarian Court of Audit).
mp_assets_source_note: Combined declarant and spouse holdings; source: Bulgarian Court of Audit (Сметна палата).
mp_assets_page_description: Bulgarian MPs ranked by net worth from their most recent property/interest declaration filed with the Court of Audit.
mp_assets_page_footer: Net worth = sum of declared real estate, vehicles, cash, bank deposits, receivables, investments, securities and company shares (declarant + spouse) minus declared debts. Source: register.cacbg.bg (Bulgarian Court of Audit). Each MP's most recent filed declaration is used.
mp_assets_no_data: No declared assets data for this candidate.
connections_no_path: No path between these two MPs
mp_connections_full_intro: Each row is a shortest path through the business connections graph from this MP to another. Direct shared companies (2 steps) usually indicate an explicit business overlap; longer paths show indirect links through co-officers or owners.
mp_connections_no_paths: No paths to other MPs in the data
mp_connections_no_paths_long: No business-connection paths to other MPs were found for this candidate. Either they have no declared companies, or none of those companies share an officer/owner with another MP.
mp_connections_neighborhood_hint: Showing immediate 1-hop business neighborhood (no MP→MP paths found).
mp_connections_path_graph_hint: Path subgraph — click a node for details. Ctrl/Cmd + scroll to zoom, drag to pan.
connections_no_pairs: No MP↔MP connections match the current filters.
connections_find_intro: Pick any two MPs — we'll find the shortest path between them through declared companies and shared associates.
connections_find_no_path: No path was found between these two MPs through declared companies or shared associates.
connections_find_empty: Pick a starting MP above to begin.
connections_hero_matrix_caption: Party × party MP↔MP ties — click a cell to drill in.
tr_no_current_records: No currently-active officers or owners on file.
tr_source_commerce_registry: Source: Bulgarian Commerce Registry (Търговски регистър) open data on data.egov.bg. Roles include both currently held and historical ones, since active management while seated is restricted by ЗПК Art. 35.
